title: corynabutilon ceratocarpum
intro: Corynabutilon ceratocarpum, also known as the bush tomato, is a native Australian plant that belongs to the Solanaceae family. The medicinal properties of this plant include its high antioxidant content and potential anti-inflammatory properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Corynabutilon ceratocarpum include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them as a tea, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and reduce inflammation.
